name: iris-monorepo
description: Open-source Chrome extension and local browser automation runtime for OpenCode.

scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/opencode build && bun run --cwd packages/mcp build && bun run --cwd packages/omp build
scripts.check:runtime: node --check packages/core/bin/broker.cjs packages/core/bin/browser-cli.cjs packages/core/bin/cli.js packages/core/bin/native-host.cjs packages/core/extension/background.js
scripts.test: node --test packages/core/test/ && node scripts/check-skill-tools.mjs && node --test packages/omp/test/load.test.mjs

author: Michael Mizner
